milestoneTitle: Phase M9.14a — Thinner active-highlight line. The inset 1px inner accent ring is removed from the five unified active-highlight recipes (nav chips: learn/tools/projects, .filter-chip.is-active, and .dash-panel.is-activated / .learn-zone.is-activated) so the line reads at roughly half its prior weight. What remains: the element's own 1px border in --accent-border plus the soft outer 10px --accent-glow halo; activated panels keep their warm shadow lift. Dashboard CTAs (.dash-action-*) and the learn-zone drag-drop drop-candidate hint keep their inner rings — different components, different punch signal.
